category_sources: source_facts.description says ISO9660+RR manipulation tool; official GNU page and man page describe xorriso as creating, loading, manipulating, and writing ISO 9660 filesystems with Rock Ridge extensions.
display_name_sources: official GNU page title is GNU xorriso; source_facts.name is xorriso.
docs_sources: official GNU xorriso page links README, help, and man pages; the GNU man page is dedicated command documentation.
repo_sources: official GNU page says original xorriso source is hosted in libisoburn and development versions come from Libburnia repositories; official Libburnia Gitea hosts libburnia/libisoburn.
tags_sources: source_facts.description names ISO9660+RR; official GNU page and man page mention ISO 9660, Rock Ridge, CD/DVD/BD media, and mkisofs/cdrecord emulation.
